pom.xml.general_idea: Change the Maven compiler release property from Java 11 to Java 17 to target the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Code compiled for Java 11 may not utilize Java 17 features or may fail if Java 17-specific APIs are used without the correct release flag; ensures bytecode compatibility with JDK 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the release version in the maven-compiler-plugin configuration to Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the compiler plugin explicitly targets Java 17 bytecode, overriding or reinforcing the property setting for correct compilation on the target JDK.
